# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8 offset-md-2">
            <div class="blog-post mb-4">
                <h1>{{ $post->title }}</h1>
                <div class="post-meta text-muted mb-3">
                    <span>By {{ $post->author->name }}</span>
                    <span class="mx-2">|</span>
                    <span>{{ $post->created_at->format('F d, Y') }}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="post-content mb-5">
                    {!! $post->content !!}
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="comments-section">
                <h3 class="mb-4">Comments ({{ $comments->count() }})</h3>

                @forelse($comments as $comment)
                    <div class="comment mb-4 p-3 border rounded">
                        <div class="comment-header d-flex align-items-center mb-2">
                            <img src="{{ $comment->user->avatar ?? '/images/default-avatar.png' }}" 
                                 alt="{{ $comment->user->name }}" 
                                 class="rounded-circle me-2" 
                                 width="40" 
                                 height="40">
                            <div>
                                <strong>{{ $comment->user->name }}</strong>
                                <div class="text-muted small">
                                    {{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="comment-content">
                            {!! $comment->content !!}
                        </div>
                        @if($comment->replies && $comment->replies->count() > 0)
                            <div class="replies mt-3 ms-4">
                                @foreach($comment->replies as $reply)
                                    <div class="reply mb-3 p-2 border-start border-3">
                                        <div class="reply-header d-flex align-items-center mb-2">
                                            <img src="{{ $reply->user->avatar ?? '/images/default-avatar.png' }}" 
                                                 alt="{{ $reply->user->name }}" 
                                                 class="rounded-circle me-2" 
                                                 width="30" 
                                                 height="30">
                                            <div>
                                                <strong>{{ $reply->user->name }}</strong>
                                                <div class="text-muted small">
                                                    {{ $reply->created_at->diffForHumans() }}
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="reply-content">
                                            {!! $reply->content !!}
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                @endforeach
                            </div>
                        @endif
                    </div>
                @empty
                    <p class="text-muted">No comments yet. Be the first to comment!</p>
                @endforelse
            </div>

            @auth
                <div class="comment-form mt-5">
                    <h4 class="mb-3">Leave a Comment</h4>
                    <form action="{{ route('comments.store', $post) }}" method="POST">
                        @csrf
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label for="comment-content" class="form-label">Your Comment</label>
                            <textarea name="content" 
                                      id="comment-content" 
                                      class="form-control @error('content') is-invalid @enderror" 
                                      rows="5" 
                                      placeholder="Write your comment here... You can use HTML tags like <b>, <i>, <a>, etc."
                                      required>{{ old('content') }}</textarea>
                            @error('content')
                                <div class="invalid-feedback">{{ $message }}</div>
                            @enderror
                            <small class="form-text text-muted">
                                You can use HTML formatting: &lt;b&gt;bold&lt;/b&gt;, &lt;i&gt;italic&lt;/i&gt;, &lt;a href="url"&gt;link&lt;/a&gt;
                            </small>
                        </div>
                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Post Comment</button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            @else
                <div class="alert alert-info mt-5">
                    Please <a href="{{ route('login') }}">login</a> to leave a comment.
                </div>
            @endauth
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
@endsection
